series_metadata.series_description: Contains all proprietary information from the regulated industrial/agricultural entity. May also contain handwritten notes, phone memorandums and related information of a confidential nature.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Continually maintain and update microfilm in operating area ; Paper: Retain in operating area five years destroy data deemed not useful. Microfilm data that is deemed use- ful and destroy hardcopy after microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
